data.title: Argentina Sets Up Committee to Investigate Milei’s Link to $LIBRA Crypto Scandal
data.description:
The controversy has been a cause of concern for President Javier Milei’s administration since February. Initially, the Libertarian President praised the LIBRA memecoin as a private initiative to boost Argentina’s economy by supporting …
source: https://coinpedia.org/uncategorized/argentina-sets-up-committee-to-investigate-mileis-link-to-libra-crypto-scandal/

data.title: Data: Whales sold more than 1.32 billion DOGE in the past 48 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On-chain analyst Ali Yu X wrote that according to Santiment data, whales sold more than 1.32 billion DOGE in the past 48 hours.

data.title: Placeholder Partner: If Bitcoin loses its current level, there is a lot of support at $70,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Placeholder partner Chris Burniske wrote in X, "If we lose this level, the next Bitcoin support level to watch is $70,000, where there is a lot of support, located at the high point of the 2021 cycle and the high point of the range from March to October 2024. People will inevitably become greedy and predict that the price will fall lower than it actually does, so I prefer to enter the market in batches at reasonable entry points."

data.title: The Hang Seng Index turned positive after falling by more than 4%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Market data shows that Hong Kong stocks opened low and ended high, with the Hang Seng Index turning positive in the afternoon, having previously fallen by more than 4%. The Hang Seng Technology Index rose by more than 2%, and chip stocks strengthened. SMIC (00981.HK) rose by nearly 11%, and Hua Hong Semiconductor (01347.HK) rose by more than 7%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda: If the economy improves as expected, interest rates will continue to rise
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda said that Japan's economy is recovering moderately, but there are still some signs of weakness. We must be vigilant about the increasing uncertainty in the outlook for trade policies of various countries. The current potential inflation rate is below 2%, but it is gradually accelerating. If the economy improves as expected, interest rate hikes will continue. (Jinshi)

data.title: DWF Labs subscribes 250 million WLFI at $0.1
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Ai Yi, DWF Labs subscribed 250 million WLFI at US$0.1, which is 6.67 times the first round subscription price (US$0.015) and 2 times the second round subscription price (US$0.05). Four days ago, DWF transferred 25 million USDC to the WLFI multi-signature address and received 250 million tokens 20 hours later.

data.title: Binance VIP Borrowing Adds BANANAS31 and MUBARAK as Borrowable Assets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Binance announced that new borrowable assets have been added to VIP lending: Banana For Scale (BANANAS31) and Mubarak (MUBARAK).

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 77,000 USDT with a Narrowed 3.18% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 09, 2025, 06:09 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 77,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 77,059.992188 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 3.18% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Anonymous Trader Sets $45 Million Buy Wall on Upbit's Ethereum Market
data.description: According to BlockBeats, a South Korean trader known as Definalist shared on social media that an unidentified individual has established a $45 million buy wall on Upbit's Ethereum spot market. So far, it appears that approximately $10 million worth of Ethereum (ETH) has been purchased by this anonymous trader.

data.title: Definalist: An Upbit user set a $45 million ETH buy order wall, and $10 million has been traded
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Korean trader Definalist wrote, "It looks like an unknown anonymous Korean has set up a $45 million buy order wall on Upbit's Ethereum spot market. So far, it seems that he has purchased about $10 million worth of ETH."
